title: Effect on existing commissions
doc_html:
§1395.5.  Effect on existing commissions

Appointed or elected municipal charter commissions currently in existence at the time of the passage of this Act shall be permitted to function under authority at the time of their election or appointment.

Acts 1980, No. 703, §1.
